meta.title: Tokenized oil & commodity RWA registry
meta.note: Seed registry. Entries compiled from public issuer documentation and require verification before publication. The headline finding is the gap itself: no tokenized crude oil product currently operates at institutional scale.

gap.oilEquityNote: Approximate combined market capitalization of listed oil & gas majors (illustrative order of magnitude)
gap.tokenizedCommodityNote: Approximate live tokenized commodity value, dominated by gold products (PAXG, XAUT)

assets.name: Pax Gold
assets.relevance: Benchmark for compliant commodity-backed token structure — the template a crude-backed token would follow

assets.name: Tether Gold
assets.relevance: Largest tokenized commodity by market value alongside PAXG

assets.name: Tokenized oil-major equity wrappers
assets.relevance: Equity wrapper programs exist but oil & gas coverage is thin and unverified — tracked as a coverage gap

assets.name: Ondo Short-Term US Govt Bond
assets.relevance: Context: institutional RWA rails exist and are proven for treasuries — not yet applied to energy

assets.name: Petro
assets.relevance: Cautionary precedent: oil-linked token without verifiable reserves attestation or redemption, wound down in 2024

assets.name: Direct tokenized crude (barrels / royalty streams)
assets.relevance: The whitespace GAEA targets: no verifiable, institutionally credible tokenized crude instrument exists today
